title: Iceburg’s Warning
description: Robin’s secret movements and the World Government’s presence begin to pull Water Seven away from a simple ship-repair story.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Luffy, Nico Robin, Franky, Nami, Paulie. Robin’s secret movements and the World Government’s presence begin to pull Water Seven away from a simple ship-repair story.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What's wrong? Why don't you fight back?

summary: Robin’s secret movements and the World Government’s presence begin to pull Water Seven away from a simple ship-repair story.
